Name: sappqm_aiml_scenarios
Title: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Scenarios
ShortText: Manage Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Scenarios for automation of manufacturing processes
Description: Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (or AI/ML) Scenarios Management enables scenarios that are based on machine learning models to assist and automate manufacturing processes. You can create new scenarios that can be activated and managed at a central place based on simple configuration steps by business user allowing lifecycle management. This solution simplifies the integration of ML pipeline for predictive quality use cases, such as Defect Detection and Visual Inspection. Note: Please be informed that these APIs are deprecated and their further use is not encouraged. These APIs will be replaced by the new APIs from the redesigned Visual Inspection applications.
